name: SLB LIMITED/NV
summary: SLB is a global technology company providing energy services and solutions across more than 100 countries. It operates through four divisions: Digital (cloud platforms, AI, seismic data), Reservoir Performance (wireline, stimulation, intervention), Well Construction (drilling, measurements, fluids, equipment), and Production Systems (subsea, artificial lift, completions, valves). SLB also offers Data Center Solutions and carbon capture via SLB Capturi. In 2025, it acquired ChampionX, a leader in chemistry solutions and artificial lift.

products.name: Delfi
products.description: Cloud-based digital platform for energy workflows and reservoir development planning.

products.name: Lumi
products.description: Cloud technology platform supporting digital energy solutions.

products.name: Petrel
products.description: Domain-focused application for reservoir simulation and well planning, offered as SaaS or perpetual license.

products.name: Techlog
products.description: Specialized application for subsurface data analysis offered as SaaS or perpetual license.

products.name: Performance Live
products.description: Digital service delivery centers for real-time monitoring and remote decision making in field operations.

products.name: SLB OneSubsea
products.description: Integrated subsea solutions including wellheads, trees, manifolds, and control systems via joint venture.

products.name: Electrical Submersible Pumps
products.description: Artificial lift systems for oil and gas production optimization.

products.name: Data Center Solutions
products.description: Modular data center enclosures, cooling systems, and critical infrastructure for hyperscalers and enterprises.

products.name: SLB Capturi
products.description: Carbon capture solutions and technologies for hard-to-abate industries including cement and waste-to-energy.

products.name: Digital Exploration Library
products.description: Licensed seismic surveys and subsurface data supporting exploration, development, and carbon storage decisions.

partnerships.description: Owns 20% of SLB OneSubsea joint venture providing integrated subsea solutions.
Owns 10% of SLB OneSubsea joint venture for subsea production systems.
Joint venture partner in SLB Capturi (80% SLB-owned) for industrial carbon capture solutions.
